additional_artifacts.description: Additional artifacts that are included in the report, such as metadata.

additional_schema_elements.description: Additional schema elements that are included in the report, like resources or tags.

compression.description: The compression format used for the report, e.g., GZIP or ZIP.

format.description: The format of the report, such as text or CSV.

id.description: A unique identifier for the report definition.

refresh_closed_reports.description: Indicates whether closed reports should be refreshed.

report_versioning.description: The versioning strategy for the report, such as CREATE_NEW_REPORT or OVERWRITE_REPORT.

s3_bucket.description: The name of the S3 bucket where the report is stored.

s3_prefix.description: The prefix used in the S3 bucket for the report files.

s3_region.description: The AWS region where the S3 bucket is located.

tags.description: A set of tags associated with the report for identification and organization.

time_unit.description: The time unit for the report, such as HOURLY or DAILY.
